title: justicia nagpurensis
intro: Justicia nagpurensis, also known as the Nagpur justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Justicia nagpurensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Justicia nagpurensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health applications.
